productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Plain Mangalgiri Green Tunics
description: CompositionGreen tunic top made of 100% Mangalgiri cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with yellow piping at the hem, pin tucked bib with yellow thread detailing, Mandarin collar with a buttoned chest placket, yellow piping along the placket and has two slit pockets with yellow piping and buttoned loopsFittingRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironPerfect for the pretty you, this Mangalgiri cotton tunic top from mother earth is a great addition to your wardrobe. The pintucked bib and stylish slit pockets on the waist ooze feminine attitude, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans or leggings and heavily embellished slippers for a perfect ethnic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in tunic topsHeight-5.7", Chest-33"
